title: Clippit word assemble result
description: Result payload of `clippit word assemble` written to stdout in JSON mode.

template.description: Absolute path of the template .docx file, or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

data.description: Absolute path of the XML data file, or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

output.description: Absolute path of the assembled output file, or '<stdout>' when written to stdout.

outputSize.description: Size of the assembled output .docx file in bytes.

templateError.description: true when the assembler detected template markup errors but still emitted a document.
